task: Using only the embedded packet (three records) and given remediation options and budget, perform a sensitivity analysis around the deadlock governing threshold (deadlock warning when stall_cycles > max_stall while fifo_full = 1). Identify records whose classification (deadlock warning vs. safe) is unstable under small perturbations, report row-level intermediate values and formulas, compute remediation cost feasibility under max_budget, mark ambiguous or missing items as needs_review (do not invent inputs). Deliver a spreadsheet (ready_valid_checker_1.xlsx) and an expert memo (expert_memo.md) that include formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table.
